name: design-sprint
description: Run a structured 5-day process to prototype, test, and validate product ideas with real users. Use when the user mentions "design sprint", "validate in a week", "rapid prototype", "test with users", "de-risk before building", "GV sprint", "prototype testing", or "design workshop". Also trigger when a team needs to make a critical product decision quickly, resolve stakeholder disagreements, or test risky ideas before investing in development. Covers mapping, sketching, deciding, prototyping, and
author: wondelai
summary_zh: 这是一套为期5天的结构化流程，帮你快速出原型并找用户验证想法。特别适合在投入开发前规避风险、快速拍板关键决策或解决团队分歧的场景。
